overall.description: A stationary first-person view of a futuristic urban street in a video game, likely Cyberpunk 2077, showing multi-lane traffic flowing past an elevated pedestrian walkway. The scene features towering glass skyscrapers, a large orange structural pillar, and a water canal, with vehicles and a pedestrian moving through the frame while the camera remains fixed.

agents.ego_description: standing stationary on an elevated walkway observing the traffic below

urban waterway running parallel to the street
contemporary building with distinctive red structural elements
pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes across the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a stationary view of a futuristic city street from an elevated walkway. Multiple lanes of traffic flow continuously across the yellow-striped crosswalk, while modern glass skyscrapers rise in the background under an overcast sky. An orange structural pillar stands prominently in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban street with elevated walkway and water canal

events.description: pedestrian enters the crosswalk from the right side and begins crossing the street

agents.ego_description: remaining stationary on the walkway watching the pedestrian cross below

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk from right to left

segments.scene_description: A pedestrian enters the frame and crosses the multi-lane street using the yellow-striped crosswalk. Vehicles continue to flow around the crossing pedestrian, who moves steadily from the right side of the frame toward the left. The camera remains fixed on the scene from the elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban street with elevated walkway and water canal

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead in the sky between buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the street scene and aerial traffic from the fixed position

notable_agents.action: flying car moving across the sky between the skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: After the pedestrian exits the frame, traffic continues to flow along the multi-lane street. A flying vehicle passes through the sky between the futuristic towers, highlighting the advanced technology of the setting. The scene maintains its steady observation of the cyberpunk city street until the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary first-person perspective of a futuristic urban thoroughfare that evolves from a steady flow of ground traffic to a display of advanced aerial technology. It begins from an elevated walkway overlooking a multi-lane street where vehicles stream across yellow-striped crosswalks beneath towering glass skyscrapers and an overcast sky. As the scene unfolds, a pedestrian enters from the right and steadily crosses the road, momentarily intersecting the continuous flow of traffic. Once the pedestrian exits the frame, the focus shifts upward as a flying vehicle glides between the futuristic towers. The shot finally settles back into a steady observation of the cyberpunk city, blending the movement of ground vehicles with the high-tech activity in the sky.
